notes: v1.14.132 - ICON SYSTEM Stage 1 (Ref landing): wire branded WebP art onto the 6 Reference-grid cards (Optics/Hardware/CLI-IB/HW REF/Know/Compass), replacing the Phosphor #ph-* SVG sprite glyphs. New /icons/ folder holds the full 17-file ship batch; all 17 added to the sw.js precache array up front (offline-first - they would 404 in the cold aisle otherwise) so Stages 2-3 (Work cards, Command stat tiles + assistant mark) are HTML-only. One new CSS rule .rf-i-img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:contain;drop-shadow} fills its container; the per-surface size lives on the container - body.rd #ref-grid .rf-card .rf-cic{width:96px;height:96px} (Ref grid only; Work cards keep their 36px svg until Stage 2). The art carries its own color; the card chrome (corner brackets + --rfac accent glow) is untouched. Redesign-only (body.rd / #ref-grid scope) - legacy path byte-identical, #ph-* sprite symbols left in place (retired in a later sweep). node --check sw.js, CSS brace gate, three-stamp lockstep. DEVICE-VERIFY (gloved, cold-aisle): airplane mode + hard reload, open Ref - all 6 cards paint the branded art crisply at legible size, no 404 / broken-image, card layout intact; add ?legacy=1 and confirm the 5-tab legacy UI is unchanged.
